dict.string: Compose Mesh uses your device location to place your local agents on the mesh map when you allow it.
Compose Mesh uses your device location to place your local agents on the mesh map when you allow it.
Compose Mesh needs camera access when an enabled local agent skill requires video input.
Compose Mesh needs microphone access when an enabled local agent skill requires audio input.
Compose Mesh needs screen recording access when an enabled local agent skill requires screen capture.
